# unregisterFromEngine()

**Instance Method**

Removes the group from the engine’s dictionary.

## Declaration

```swift
func unregisterFromEngine()
```

## Discussion

For more information, see [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEEngine/groups].

## Defining the Group

- **register(engine:)**: Adds the group to the engine’s dictionary.
